sourceRefs: GOLD-STANDARD TEMPLATE DRAFT — first unit built to the full leçon spec (objectif fonctionnel + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-style comprehension). Awaiting native-speaker review before approval.
Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ A1 (Hachette), Dossier 1 (se présenter — être, nationalités, tu/vous). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
